description: Demonstrates strong work discipline by starting tasks early, allowing better planning, focus, and consistent productivity throughout the day.
examples: I wake up at 5:00 AM to start my day early.
I report to work at 7:00 AM even though the official late time is 9:31 AM.

proofs.title: Time Logs & Attendance
proofs.content: My daily attendance records show a consistent pattern of arriving at least 2 hours before the required time. This extra time is used for deep work and planning the day's tasks without distractions.

proofs.title: Punctuality
proofs.content: I arrive at work or meeting before the scheduled time..

description: Approaches challenges analytically by identifying root causes, evaluating possible solutions, and implementing practical fixes efficiently.
examples: I enjoy identifying problems and solving them independently.
I have participated in programming competitions.
I try to provide a simple solution to a complex problem
proofs: Won the STI Into Programming Competition.
Passed the Department of Information and Communications Technology Electronic Data Processing Specialist certification examination, including both the paper-based and computer-based tests.

Developed a solution for the Tara, Basa! Tutoring Program of the Department of Social Welfare and Development, enabling beneficiaries to be matched with the nearest tutoring center, implemented with zero additional budget.

description: Works effectively with minimal supervision, proactively taking ownership of tasks and continuously seeking ways to improve processes and outcomes.
examples: I view problems as challenges to overcome and take initiative without needing constant supervision.

proofs.title: Self-Directed Learning
proofs.content: Independently mastered several modern web frameworks (React, Laravel, Tailwind) through documentation and hands-on projects, applying this knowledge to improve existing portfolio sites.

description: Quickly adjusts to new tools, technologies, and changing requirements while maintaining quality and productivity.
examples: Deployed across diverse functions including national budgeting, event planning, rescue operations, and other non-IT roles, with successful outcomes in each assignment.

proofs.title: Multiple designation at DSWD
proofs.content: I have been assigned several designations/tasks that are not connected with my positions or at least my core tasks. This includes my time in the 2024-2025 budget allocation for the whole program, and several other designations that are too many to put in this section.

description: Delivers reliable and steady results by maintaining focus, meeting deadlines, and ensuring quality across tasks and projects.
examples: I do three (3) sets of push ups in morning since June of 2021.
I do sit ups in morning since March of 2023.
I trained with Duolingo since 2024. I have trained with Duolingo for 2 years. I have trained with Duolingo for 2 years.

proofs.title: Blood Pressure
proofs.content: I maintain a consistent blood pressure of 120/80 mmHg.

proofs.title: Healthy Chest
proofs.content: I maintain a healthy chest size without going to the Gym

description: Motivated by difficult tasks and energized by solving complex problems, especially in unfamiliar or demanding situations

proofs.title: Basic Citizen Military Training
proofs.content: I joined the Basic Citizen Military Training (BCMT) program conducted by the Philippine Air Force in 2021 to enhance my physical fitness and discipline.

proofs.title: Covid-19 Marshall
proofs.content: I participated in the Covid-19 Marshall program in 2021, where I helped lower down the number of covid-19 cases in our town

proofs.title: DOLE Enumerator
proofs.content: I signed a contract with DOLE to work as an Enumerator for their projects. Hiking to mountains and rural areas just to list the status of working children. Taking the job not for the minimum wage pay but for the challenge of going beyond
